segments.text: And in that day you will say:
O Lord, I will praise You; Though You were angry with me, Your anger is turned away, and You comfort me.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Behold, God is my salvation, I will trust and not be afraid; For Yah, the Lord, is my strength and song; He also has become my salvation.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Therefore with joy you will draw water From the wells of salvation.
And in that day you will say:
Praise the Lord, call upon His name; Declare His deeds among the peoples, Make mention that His name is exalted.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Sing to the Lord, For He has done excellent things; This is known in all the earth.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Cry out and shout, O inhabitant of Zion, For great is the Holy One of Israel in your midst!
segments.speaker: Israel
